harmonic_oscillator_potential.name: Quantum Harmonic Oscillator Potential
harmonic_oscillator_potential.search_text: Quantum harmonic oscillator potential parabolic quadratic spring force constant frequency omega vibration molecular bond phonon

coulomb_potential.name: Coulomb Potential
coulomb_potential.description: V(r) = -Z e^2 / (4 pi epsilon_0 r) for hydrogen-like atoms.
coulomb_potential.search_text: Coulomb potential electrostatic attraction electron nucleus hydrogen-like atom charge inverse r 1/r electric field SI units

coulomb_potential_natural.name: Coulomb Potential (Natural / Atomic Units)
coulomb_potential_natural.description: V(r) = -Z/r in atomic units (e = 4 pi epsilon_0 = 1).
coulomb_potential_natural.search_text: Coulomb potential natural units atomic units simplified hydrogen-like atom nuclear charge Z inverse r

infinite_square_well_potential.name: Infinite Square Well Potential
infinite_square_well_potential.description: V(x) = 0 for 0 <= x <= a, infinity otherwise (particle in a box).
infinite_square_well_potential.search_text: Infinite square well particle in a box rigid walls potential well confined particle standing waves quantized energy levels PIB

finite_square_well_potential.name: Finite Square Well Potential
finite_square_well_potential.search_text: Finite square well potential bound states tunneling evanescent wave penetration depth transcendental equation finite depth

step_potential.name: Step Potential
step_potential.description: V(x) = 0 for x < 0, V0 for x >= 0.
step_potential.search_text: Step potential barrier scattering reflection transmission coefficient discontinuity abrupt potential change quantum tunneling

delta_function_potential.name: Delta Function Potential
delta_function_potential.description: V(x) = -V0 delta(x), an attractive delta-function potential.
delta_function_potential.search_text: Delta function potential Dirac delta point interaction attractive well single bound state scattering impurity contact interaction

double_well_potential.name: Double Well Potential
double_well_potential.description: V(x) = a*(x^2 - x0^2)^2, a symmetric double-well quartic potential with minima at x = +/- x0.
double_well_potential.search_text: Double well potential quartic symmetric tunneling splitting bistable two-state system quantum tunneling barrier ammonia molecule

morse_potential.name: Morse Potential
morse_potential.description: V(r) = D_e(1 - e^{-alpha(r-r_e)})^2, models anharmonic molecular vibrations with dissociation energy D_e.
morse_potential.search_text: Morse potential anharmonic oscillator molecular vibration diatomic dissociation energy bond stretching spectroscopy vibrational levels
